svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="规范的自我生长循环" id="specslifecycle"> <mxGraphModel dx="-405" dy="-97" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="踩坑 → 沉淀:规范怎么自我生长" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="340" x="310" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="1. 踩坑
人或 Agent 犯错
浮点金额 / 漏 tenant_id" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fffbeb;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="2. 复盘
事故复盘会当场产出
一条规则或技能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="320" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="3. 落盘
判断类型:约束→规则
方法→技能 · 进仓库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="580" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ecfdf5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="4. 自动生效
新 Agent 启动即加载
下次想犯直接被拦" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="580" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d1fae5;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="5. 规则越攒越厚
项目越来越聪明
同类坑不再踩第二次" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="190" x="320" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="关键:落盘要及时 · 踩坑当场进仓库,不「等有空再补」
复盘不开完不算完,规则没落盘的复盘 = 没复盘" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="230" x="60" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s3" /> <mxCell id="ec" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s4" /> <mxCell id="ed" edge="1" parent="1" source="s4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#0f766e;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;" target="s5" /> <mxCell id="ee" edge="1" parent="1" source="s5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;endArrow=block;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="s1" /> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 495px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 踩坑 → 沉淀:规范怎么自我生长

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 242, 242), rgb(35, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 踩坑
人或 Agent 犯错
浮点金额 / 漏 tenant_id

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 336px;

div.div:
2. 复盘
事故复盘会当场产出
一条规则或技能

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 175px; margin-left: 596px;

div.div:
3. 落盘
判断类型:约束→规则
方法→技能 · 进仓库

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 596px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. 自动生效
新 Agent 启动即加载
下次想犯直接被拦

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(209, 250, 229), rgb(4, 39, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 336px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. 规则越攒越厚
项目越来越聪明
同类坑不再踩第二次

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 335px; margin-left: 76px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
关键:落盘要及时 · 踩坑当场进仓库,不「等有空再补」
复盘不开完不算完,规则没落盘的复盘 = 没复盘
